title: The Wicked and the Damned
notes: Collection/anthology row present; individual contents not explicitly recoverable from TLBranson list.

curation.synopsis: Three strangers — a commissar, an officer of the Astra Militarum, and an Imperial priest — find themselves stranded together on the mist-shrouded cemetery world of Silence, surrounded by the dead and tended by sinister mortuary-servitors. As they wait for an unknown reckoning, each is compelled in turn to tell the last thing they remember: a ghost story, a monster saga, and a tale of psychological horror that, braided together, draw the strangers towards one terrible truth. The opening volume of the Warhammer Horror imprint links three Warhammer 40,000 novellas — by Josh Reynolds, Phil Kelly, and David Annandale — through a frame whose meaning only sharpens in the final pages.
